texto: You think this man is the enemy? Huh? This is a worker! Any union keeps this man out ain't a union, it's a goddam club! They got you fightin' white against colored, native against foreign, hollow against hollow, when you know there ain't but two sides in this world — them that work and them that don't. You work, they don't. That's all you need to know about the enemy.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de - Joe Kenehan que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “You think this man is the enemy? Huh? This is a worker! Any union keeps this man out ain't a unio…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, film, against, com foco em trabalho e reflexao.
